**1. Docker Publishes Guide for Running AI Agents in Secure Sandboxes**

Docker released a comprehensive guide on running Claude Code with Docker Model Runner, MCP servers, and secure sandboxes (Mar 13). The guide demonstrates how to connect AI tools via MCP servers while maintaining security boundaries — directly relevant for anyone running agentic AI in production. This validates the containerized agent pattern that production AI companies are adopting.
